chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 5453 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.22715/2025 3. For hearing of main case 17.02.2026 Ms. Navin Merchant, Advocate along with Mr. Salman Yousuf and Ms. Muskan Asif, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Abdullah, Advocate for respondent No.2 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani Learned Assistant Attorney General. ------------------------------------ At the very outset, learned counsel for respondent No.2 files a statement along with set of documents on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record, whereby recognition of the petitioner M/s. Suleman Roshan Medical College has been acceded to. He handovers the copy of the same to learned counsel for the petitioner, who on receipt of the copy seeks disposal of the petition in view of the statement filed on behalf of respondent No.2 today. Learned Assistant Attorney General also has no objection to the disposal of the petition and undertakes that Ministry of National Health Services, Regulations & Coordination, Government of Pakistan shall notify the college in the gazette within two weeks from the date of this order. Learned counsel for the petitioner also requests for restoration of the petitioner’s active admission status on its official portal. Accordingly, respondent No.2 Pakistan Medical & Dental Council (PMDC) is directed to remove the rider imposed by him on the petitioner’s official portal. The petition along with the listed application stands disposed of in the above terms.

Accordingly, respondent No.2 Pakistan Medical & Dental Council (PMDC) is directed to remove the rider imposed by him on the petitioner’s official portal. The petition along with the listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
